name: tapps-brain — Persistent Memory
description: ContextEngine plugin for tapps-brain: persistent cross-session memory with BM25 ranking, exponential decay, and multi-agent Hive sharing.

mcpCommand.description: Command to spawn the tapps-brain MCP server

profilePath.description: Path to memory profile YAML config

tokenBudget.description: Max tokens for injected memories in assemble()

captureRateLimit.description: Capture facts every N ingest() calls (0 = every call)

agentId.description: Unique agent identifier for Hive multi-agent sharing

citations.description: Citation footers in assemble() output: 'auto'/'on' appends 'Source: memory/<tier>/<key>.md', 'off' disables

oneOf.description: Register only the listed tool groups

toolGroups.description: Tool groups to expose as native OpenClaw tools. Use an array to restrict tools for a specific agent role. Groups: core (memory_search/get), lifecycle (reinforce/supersede/history/search_sessions), search (stats/health/metrics/prompts), admin (audit/tags/profile/maintenance/config/export/import), hive (hive_*/agent_*), federation (federation_*), graph (memory_relations/find_related/query_relations). Example: ["core","lifecycle","search"] for a coder agent.
